ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded */,
  "volume_weighted_avg" REAL /* Volume weighted average price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the trading period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the trading period */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the record */,
  "num_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions during the trading period */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "stock_split" INTEGER /* Whether the stock underwent a split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock ticker */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("company_name") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the company is registered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., basic user, professional trader, institutional client) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored user password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics performed (e.g., trend analysis, volatility, prediction) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "calculation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the analytics model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be notified */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker related to the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, clicked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features included in the subscription */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Length of the trial period in days */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription auto-renews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the signal */,
  "signal_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the trading signal */,
  "signal_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_options" TEXT /* Additional options used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., feature request, bug report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker related to the news */,
  "news_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)
